cases.prompt: Onboard 5,000 Intune-managed Windows 11 devices to MDE and roll out ASR safely.

expect.label: prefer Intune Security Settings Management for cloud-managed estates
enable tamper protection before any other policy
pilot ASR rules in audit mode for ~14 days before moving to block
enable EDR in block mode (mandatory with third-party AV)

cases.prompt: Plan MDE Plan 1 vs Plan 2 for our M365 E3 tenant - what do we lose without P2?

expect.label: Plan 2 adds EDR, AIR, advanced hunting, threat & vuln management
Plan 1 is bundled with M365 E3
server endpoints flow through Defender for Cloud / MDE for Servers

cases.prompt: Design device groups and RBAC for tier-0 admin workstations, regular workstations, and servers.

expect.label: device groups by risk tier, not by department
scope Live Response narrowly with audit logging
AIR full on workstations, semi on servers
controlled folder access on workstations only - breaks servers
